---
title: "Amélie Claire Leroy"
---

## Amélie Claire Leroy

**Dates:** (1851-1934)

### Description

novelist as Esmé Stuart

### Biography

At the time of the 1871 census she was a governess at Mary Anne Dyson’s school, she later lived with Anna Rachel Bramston and adopted a little girl called Juliette.  With Anna Bramston she was instrumental in the foundation of Winchester High School for Girls.

### Letters

- Letter from July 17 [1900]
- Letter from Sept 7th [1899]
- Letter from Oct 22d [?1897]
- Letter from Sept 10th 1892
- Letter from October 1, 1878
- Letter from April 6, 1875

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
